Discipline.name: Discipline
Discipline.description: Batter's ability to remain disciplined at the plate, increasing Balls.

Vision.name: Vision
Vision.description: Batter's ability to track the pitch as it's coming at them, reducing Called Strikes.

Intimidation.name: Intimidation
Intimidation.description: Batter's ability to intimidate the Pitcher, reducing Swinging Strikes.

Muscle.name: Muscle
Muscle.description: Batter's ability to hit Doubles, Triples, and Home Runs.

Contact.name: Contact
Contact.description: Batter's ability to make contact with a pitch, putting the ball in play.

Cunning.name: Cunning
Cunning.description: Batter's ability to coax pitches outside the zone and increase Hit By Pitch.

Selflessness.name: Selflessness
Selflessness.description: Batter's willingness to hit into a sacrifice play.

Determination.name: Determination
Determination.description: Batter's ability to hit a Foul on pitches in the Strike Zone.

Wisdom.name: Wisdom
Wisdom.description: Batter's ability to adapt to repeated Pitch Types, boosting effectiveness on seen Pitches.

Insight.name: Insight
Insight.description: Batter's ability to hit a Single.

Aiming.name: Aiming
Aiming.description: Batter's ability to hit Line Drives.

Lift.name: Lift
Lift.description: Batter's ability to hit Fly Balls.

Control.name: Control
Control.description: Pitcher's ability to have control of their pitch, reducing Balls and Hit By Pitch.

Velocity.name: Velocity
Velocity.description: Pitcher's ability to throw hard and fast, increasing Swinging Strikes.

Rotation.name: Rotation
Rotation.description: Pitcher's ability to throw pitches with a high spin rate, reducing balls in play.

Stuff.name: Stuff
Stuff.description: Pitcher's ability to throw dirty pitches that result in more Ground Balls or Popups. Also increases Hit By Pitch.

Deception.name: Deception
Deception.description: Pitcher's ability to fool the batter into taking Called Strikes.

Intuition.name: Intuition
Intuition.description: Pitcher's ability to confound the batter by mixing up their Pitch Types and Categories.

Persuasion.name: Persuasion
Persuasion.description: Pitcher's ability to pitch a Foul ball.

Presence.name: Presence
Presence.description: Pitcher's ability to frighten the Batter, reducing Home Runs, Doubles, and Triples.

Defiance.name: Defiance
Defiance.description: Pitcher's ability to remain in the game when out of Energy. Also increases the amount of Energy restored on success.

Accuracy.name: Accuracy
Accuracy.description: Pitcher's ability to locate pitches in the strike zone.

Stamina.name: Stamina
Stamina.description: Pitcher's ability to remain in top form, reducing their penalty when Energy is lost and increasing their overall effectiveness.

Guts.name: Guts
Guts.description: Pitcher's ability to play better when their Energy is reduced below one third of their total, increasing their overall effectiveness.

Performance.name: Performance
Performance.description: Batter's ability to distract fielders, allowing them to reach base more often when a ball is in play.

Speed.name: Speed
Speed.description: Player's raw speed on the basepaths. Increases Hits when Batting and extra bases when Baserunning.

Greed.name: Greed
Greed.description: Baserunner's willingness to attempt to steal a base.

Stealth.name: Stealth
Stealth.description: Baserunner's ability to remain undetected when attempting to steal a base, increasing the success of stolen base attempts, and increasing their willingness to attempt to steal a base.

Arm.name: Arm
Arm.description: Fielder's ability to throw the ball, reducing Doubles and Triples.

Dexterity.name: Dexterity
Dexterity.description: Fielder's ability to make quick dextrous moves, preventing runners from getting extra bases.

Reaction.name: Reaction
Reaction.description: Fielder's ability to field Ground Balls.

Acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
Acrobatics.description: Fielder's ability to field Line Drives.

Agility.name: Agility
Agility.description: Fielder's ability to field Fly Balls.

Awareness.name: Awareness
Awareness.description: Fielder's ability to turn a Double Play, and Catcher's ability to catch a Baserunner attempting to steal a base.

Composure.name: Composure
Composure.description: Fielder's ability to play without making Errors, and Pitcher's ability to not Balk.

Luck.name: Luck
Luck.description: Player's ability to affect the outcomes of weather events. Does not directly affect the performance of a Player.

Priority.name: Priority
Priority.description: Determines a batter's position in the Lineup. Higher Priority players will bat ahead of lower Priority players.
